recommendations.title: Good Day, Ramon
recommendations.overview: After five failed attempts to go to the United States, 18-year-old Ramón decides to look for a friend’s aunt in Germany, but never finds her. With no papers or money, and without knowing the language, he barely survives living on the street until he

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh: American Dream
recommendations.overview: In his first English-language special, comedian Gad Elmaleh gleefully digs into America's food obsessions, dating culture, slang, and more.

recommendations.title: Today's Special
recommendations.overview: Young Manhattan chef Samir rediscovers his heritage and passion for life through the enchanting art of cooking Indian food.

recommendations.title: Dawn Breaks, Which Is No Small Thing
recommendations.overview: Teodoro, a Spanish engineer working as a professor in the United States, returns to Spain to enjoy a sabbatical year.

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: Black Beauty
recommendations.overview: The fates of horses, and the people who own and command them, are revealed as Black Beauty narrates the circle of his life.

recommendations.title: The Oath
recommendations.overview: In a politically-divided United States, a man struggles to make it through the Thanksgiving holiday without destroying his family.

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: The Cheetah Girls
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Music, TV Movie

recommendations.title: Lessons of a Dream
recommendations.overview: An English teacher brings soccer to a German school in the 19th Century.
